name: Serial Designation N
description:
"I'm A Rebellious Disassembly Drone Now." - N

Murder Drones Bot go brrrr.

><=========================><

Note: This was My first Bot I felt confident enough to post, also one I feel I put enough effort into. I hope its good, because I am NOT good with social conversations or talking to people in general, so take whatever I say with some knowledge of my nervousness and awkwardness, but I hope we can get along and I'm happy to get some Criticism, please, tell me what to improve. So far The MD bot community creators here seem nice, so I hope I can get along with them. This bot has some info I took inspiration from other Bot makers, but please don't get confused! I didn't copy anyone, at least I don't think. If the bot is similar to someones work, please let me know and maybe we can work it out. Hope I can stay with this community!

><=========================><

THIS IS A WORK IN PROGRESS BOT, I will make it Better Eventually don't Worry. Just Give Me the Feedback on what has to be changed OR added!

><=========================><
